ddls:
CREATE TABLE "packages" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package */,
  "package_name" TEXT /* Name of the package */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the package */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the package */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the package was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the package was last updated */,
  "maintainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the maintainer of the package */,
  "license_id" INTEGER /* ID of the license associated with the package */,
  "repository_url" TEXT /* URL of the package repository */,
  "last_checked_at" TEXT /* Date when the package was last checked for updates */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the package (e.g., active, deprecated, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_packages_maintainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("maintainer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_packages_license_id FOREIGN KEY ("license_id") REFERENCES package_licenses ("license_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "parent_package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent package */,
  "child_package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the child package */,
  "imports" INTEGER /* Number of imports from the parent package */,
  "import_methods" INTEGER /* Number of import methods from the parent package */,
  "import_classes" INTEGER /* Number of import classes from the parent package */,
  "required_packages" INTEGER /* Number of required packages from the parent package */,
  "heaviness_from_parent_on_mira" INTEGER /* Heaviness of the dependency from the parent package on MIRA */,
  "dependency_type" TEXT /* Type of dependency (e.g., direct, indirect, suggested) */,
  "dependency_status" TEXT /* Status of the dependency (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "dependency_description" TEXT /* Description of the dependency */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the dependency was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependencies_child_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("child_package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependencies_parent_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "released_at" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Changelog for the version */,
  "commit_hash" TEXT /* Commit hash of the version in the repository */,
  "download_url" TEXT /* URL to download the version */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_versions_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_fields" (
  "field_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each field */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the field */,
  "field_value" TEXT /* Value of the field */,
  "field_type" TEXT /* Type of the field (e.g., text, number, boolean) */,
  "field_description" TEXT /* Description of the field */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("field_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_fields_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_requirements" (
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each requirement */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package */,
  "required_package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the required package */,
  "required_version" TEXT /* Version of the required package */,
  "requirement_type" TEXT /* Type of requirement (e.g., required, suggested) */,
  "requirement_description" TEXT /* Description of the requirement */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the requirement was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("requirement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_requirements_required_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("required_package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_requirements_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, data scientist, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Date when the user last logged in */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage event */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the package */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the package was accessed */,
  "usage_type" TEXT /* Type of usage (e.g., view, install, update) */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the package was accessed */,
  "last_accessed_at" TEXT /* Date when the package was last accessed */,
  "usage_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the usage event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_usage_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_usage_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_licenses" (
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each license */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package */,
  "license_type" TEXT /* Type of the license (e.g., MIT, GPL, Apache) */,
  "license_text" TEXT /* Text of the license */,
  "license_url" TEXT /* URL to the full license text */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the license information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("license_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_licenses_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)
